description_en: Lightweight, packable, versatile wet weather protection with a semi-athletic cut and removable sleeves designed for hikers, backpackers, fast packers, and trail runners. The jacket enables customizable layering systems for variable temperatures and precipitation.
description_zh_tw: 輕量、可收納的多功能雨具，採用半運動款式剪裁和可拆卸袖口，專為登山者、背包客、快速登山者和越野跑者設計。外套可實現可自訂的分層系統，以應對不同溫度和降水。
features_en: Opposed zippers convert long sleeves to short sleeves
Weather-resistant left-hand zipper with European style
Smart Sewing Technology for weight reduction
features_zh_tw: 對稱拉鍊可將長袖轉換為短袖
三向可調整卷收式風帽
智能縫線技術減輕重量
輕微人體工程學設計的袖子

specifications_en.material: 3-layer DRY-TEC Technology with 15-denier Ballistic Airlight ripstop nylon

Designed for hikers, backpackers, fast packers, and trail runners seeking flexible weather adaptation.

description_en: Packable rainwear featuring HYDROPRO, an original Montbell 2-layer waterproof fabric, providing quick protection. Includes wrap-around design for versatility during active pursuits. Features elastic waist with snap buttons and hook-and-loop closure allowing adjustment options. Weight 71g, skirt length 45cm (M size), packed size 6x4x10cm.

description_en: Extended sun and rain protection hat with 50D nylon and DRYTEC 3L technology. Features asymmetric brim design with 7cm front and 11cm back length, offering enhanced neck protection during outdoor activities. Ideal for hiking, fishing, and mountaineering.
